title: Elizabeth Rafferty
content:
People.ContactEmail erafferty@mccarthy.ca
- University of Victoria
Elizabeth combines strategic insight with a results-driven approach, navigating challenges and guiding clients through real estate transactions with confidence and efficiency.
Elizabeth Rafferty is a partner in our Real Estate Group in Calgary. She is skilled in all aspects of commercial real estate, advising on complex acquisitions, dispositions, leasing, financing, and the development and management of real property assets. Elizabeth creates and negotiates purchase and sale agreements, joint venture and financing arrangements, commercial and industrial leases, and advises on all manner of land use and development matters for domestic and cross-border markets. She works closely with clients on office, retail, industrial, mixed-use, infrastructure, and energy projects, to deliver practical, creative solutions that help them achieve their goals. Clients appreciate her ability to deliver clarity and value at every stage. Her extensive experience acting for purchasers and vendors, lenders and borrowers, property owners and developers, and landlords and tenants allows Elizabeth to approach each matter from multiple perspectives, ensuring transactions are managed efficiently and with foresight. Elizabeth is recognized by Best Lawyers in Canada as “One to Watch” in the Commercial Leasing Law and Real Estate Law categories. She holds a BA (with distinction) from the University of Calgary, a JD from the University of Victoria, and an LLM from the University of Toronto and is a member of the Law Society of Alberta.
Recent representative experience includes:
- representing International Paper on the US$1.5-billion sale of its Global Cellulose Fibers division to American Industrial Partners.
- advising Waste Connections Inc. in its acquisition of energy waste treatment and disposal facilities from Secure Energy Services Inc. for C$1.075 billion.
- representing Renewable Energy Systems Ltd. in its sale of the Forty Mile Wind project to Acciona Energia.
- Canadian Legal Lexpert Directory Leading Lawyer: Real Estate – Property Development
